about.title: Berry helps you plan the weekend
about.subtitle: Being a parent in Haarlem is great — but figuring out what to do takes time. That's where Berry steps in.
about.missionText: Berry Kids picks the best family activities and events in the Haarlem area each week. No endless lists — we choose for you, based on the weather, your kids' ages, and what's actually happening in town.
about.voiceText: We believe great recommendations feel like a friend telling you something: short, honest, with an opinion. Berry doesn't tell you everything — Berry tells you the right things.
about.trustText: No sponsorship, no paid placements. Berry picks based on weather, kid ages, and whether something is actually worth doing. If we don't love it, you won't see it.
about.contactText: Questions, tips, or want to submit an event? We'd love to hear from you.

mapEmbed.privacyNote: We only load the map when you agree. Google will then set cookies.

cookieNotice.text: Berry Kids does not use tracking cookies. External content like Google Maps only loads when you tap to load it.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: Berry Kids respects your privacy. We use as few cookies as possible and don't load any third-party trackers until you choose to. Here's what we store.
cookies.section1Text: Cookies are small text files that websites place on your device. Some are necessary to make the site work, others are used for analytics or advertising. Berry Kids uses only functional storage — no tracking or advertising cookies.
cookies.section2List1: Saved activities — when you tap the heart, we store the slug locally in your browser (localStorage). This data never leaves your device.
cookies.section2List2: Cookie notice — a flag confirming you've seen our cookie notice.
cookies.section3Text: Some pages offer third-party content that requires manual loading:
cookies.section3List1: Google Maps — on event and activity detail pages you'll see a "Load map" button. Only when you click it do we load the Google Maps iframe, at which point Google sets cookies (NID, CONSENT). No communication with Google happens before that point. Your choice is remembered in your browser so we don't ask again for every map — clear your localStorage to reset.
cookies.section3GoogleNote: Google LLC is based in the US. By clicking "Load map" you consent to data being transferred to Google. Read Google's privacy policy at
cookies.section4Text: Berry Kids does not currently use Google Analytics, Google Ads, Facebook Pixel or similar services. If that changes, we'll ask for your consent first via a cookie banner.
cookies.section5Text: You can clear your localStorage at any time via your browser settings. For privacy questions: privacy@berrykids.nl.
